ohtani.title: Justin Wrobleski, Max Muncy lead Dodgers to 2-1 win
ohtani.blurb: Justin Wrobleski strikes out seven and Max Muncy hits a two-run home run to lead the Dodgers to a 2-1 win over the Phillies

imanaga.title: Imanaga, Hoerner lead Cubs to 10-1 win
imanaga.blurb: Seven shutout innings from Shota Imanaga, and a two-hit, four-RBI day from Nico Hoerner propel the Cubs to a 10-1 win over the Twins

suzuki.title: Six-run 1st sets tone in Cubs' 11-2 win over Tigers
suzuki.blurb: The Cubs put up a six-run 1st inning and Michael Conforto drills a two-run home run in the Cubs' 11-2 win over the Tigers

yoshida.title: Caleb Durbin leads Red Sox to 14th straight win
yoshida.blurb: Caleb Durbin crushes a go-ahead home run to lift the Red Sox to their 14th straight victory with a 6-5 win over the Orioles

okamoto.title: Kevin Cash recaps 12-2 win against Blue Jays
okamoto.blurb: Kevin Cash talks about the Rays scoring 12 runs against the Blue Jays and Drew Rasmussen's solid five innings

murakami.title: Brandon Nimmo, Wyatt Langford homer in Rangers' win
murakami.blurb: Brandon Nimmo and Wyatt Langford's home runs fuel the Rangers' 10-0 shutout victory over the White Sox

matsui.title: Machado, Tatis Jr., Merrill homer in Padres' win
matsui.blurb: Manny Machado records two homers and Fernando Tatis Jr. hits the longest home run of the MLB season so far in the Padres' 8-3 win over the Braves
